title: Add beads compatibility config flag
description: Add beads_compatibility config setting (default false) that is used when --beads CLI flag is absent. Update Python/Rust config loading, CLI behavior, docs, and BDD specs.
creator: Ryan Alyn Porter

comments.author: Ryan Alyn Porter
comments.text: Goal: add beads_compatibility config setting default false; CLI --beads overrides config, config used when flag absent. Acceptance: config schema/docs/fixtures updated; BDD covers default false and config-enabled beads mode; Python/Rust load config and resolve beads mode accordingly without fallback logic.

comments.author: Ryan Alyn Porter
comments.text: Updated config schema/docs/fixtures for beads_compatibility default false; added BDD scenarios for default false and config-enabled Beads mode; added Python/Rust steps; updated CLI beads resolution and config path helper; fixed beads_mode.feature scenario assertions.

custom.beads_acceptance_criteria: Gherkin specs cover default/override behavior; Python/Rust implementations honor config flag unless --beads passed; docs/config examples updated; parity check passes.
